description: Send each DataFrame row to an Azure Event Hub as a JSON event. Composes with synthetic_data_generator to inject test events into a queue without writing custom asset code.

upstream_asset_key.label: Upstream Asset Key
upstream_asset_key.description: Asset key of the upstream DataFrame asset

connection_string_env_var.label: Connection String Env Var
connection_string_env_var.description: Env var holding the Event Hubs namespace or hub-scoped connection string

eventhub_name.label: Event Hub Name
eventhub_name.description: Event Hub name (the entity inside the namespace)

partition_key_column.label: Partition Key Column
partition_key_column.description: Optional column to use as the partition key. Events with the same partition key land in the same partition (preserves ordering).

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Max events per send batch (1MB byte cap is enforced independently by SDK).

description.label: Description
description.description: Asset description shown in the Dagster catalog.

deps.label: Deps
deps.description: Lineage-only upstream asset keys (no data passed at runtime).

owners.label: Owners
owners.description: Asset owners — team names ('team:analytics') or email addresses.

asset_tags.label: Asset Tags
asset_tags.description: Additional key-value tags applied to the asset.

kinds.label: Kinds
kinds.description: Asset kinds for the catalog. Auto-includes 'azure' + 'eventhubs' if unset.
